metadata.title: Typing Transformer
metadata.description: Improved, configurable auto formatting as typing

regex.target: .setDesc("启用调试日志输出到控制台。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable indication of a zone's start point with '\u2B50\uFE0F'")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用使用指示区域起点的功能 '\u2B50\uFE0F'")

regex.source: .createEl("span", { text: "Enter conversion, selection, and deletion rules here. NOTES:" })
regex.target: .createEl("span", { text: "在这里输入转换、选择和删除规则。注意事项：" })

regex.source: .createEl("li", { text: "Each line is one rule. Rules that come first have higher priority." })
regex.target: .createEl("li", { text: "每行是一条规则。排在前面的规则优先级更高。" })

regex.source: .createEl("li", { text: 'Lines starting with "#" are treated as comments and ignored. Inline comments are also allowed' })
regex.target: .createEl("li", { text: 'Lines starting with "#" are treated as comments and ignored. Inline comments are also allowed' })

regex.source: .createEl("li", { text: "Certain characters ' | \\ must be escaped with backslashes \\." })
regex.target: .createEl("li", { text: "Certain characters ' | \\ must be escaped with backslashes \\." })

regex.source: .createEl("li", { text: "Whatever tab you are on when the plugin settings tab quits will be the profile that is chosen" })
regex.target: .createEl("li", { text: "当插件设置选项卡退出时，无论你当前处于哪个选项卡，该选项卡所对应的配置文件都将被选中" })

regex.source: .createEl("li", { text: "The 'global' profile will always be active" })
regex.target: .createEl("li", { text: "“全局” 配置文件将始终处于活动状态" })
